name: Hong Lu & Sinclair [Limbus Company]
description:
They've both been crushing on you hard, and they've finally decided to act on it...

[50 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL]
Thank you so much for 50 followers! Didn't realize there were that many people who wanted subpar bots for Project Moon characters but here we are. I decided to do multiple characters because it's something I hadn't really done before. Let me know if it's broken as hell.

This bot is mostly made with malepov in mind, but it should work for anypov. Femboys and twinks for all!

Also holy shit Dulcinea KICKED MY ASS.

Art by @LittleTeze
